original_abstract: This book explores the persistent challenge of how to effectively cultivate the potential of motivated young people with exceptional intellectual abilities. It delves into the increasingly critical subject of excellence in education, offering a comprehensive analysis of the strategies and environments best suited to foster high-level talent. Through a nuanced examination of contemporary pedagogical approaches and psychological insights, the work seeks to identify the institutional and social frameworks necessary to empower the next generation of thinkers and innovators.
humanized_abstract: The promotion of gifted young people with high levels of innovative ability is a recurring challenge in many countries. This book focuses on this challenge and deals with the equally important theme of excellence in education. It aims at providing a representative analysis of the educational approaches and principles, as well as of the structural and social conditions which are essential for the promotion of the talents of young people with exceptional cognitive abilities and innovative capacity. Through an analysis of current educational methods and psychological aspects, the book attempts to shed light on the structural and social conditions that will enable the future generation of intellectuals and innovators to realise their potential.
